name: Outcome Categories
description: Secondary teaching axis. Corporate-lens entry point. Each project, lesson, and pattern is tagged by what business value it produces.

outcomes.name: Save time
outcomes.description: Reduces the human hours required for a recurring task. Replaces tedium, accelerates throughput, or compresses cycle time.

outcomes.name: Improve quality
outcomes.description: Catches errors, raises consistency, or produces higher-fidelity output than was previously practical at scale.

outcomes.name: Enable new capability
outcomes.description: Unlocks something the team or business could not do before. Not a faster version of an existing process — a different process altogether.

outcomes.name: Reduce risk
outcomes.description: Lowers exposure to mistakes, compliance failures, security incidents, or knowledge loss. Includes privacy-first design, validation pipelines, and audit trails.
